commands.review_summary:
The PR strips resumable session fields from isolated cron rows while their transcript file is absent, restores them once the transcript exists, and adds regression tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main writes a cron row with `sessionId` before the transcript exists, and cleanup later prunes missing-transcript rows with `sessionId`; I did not run a runtime reproduction because this review is read-only.
